ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name (e.g., PB for Pretoria Boys) */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., league, tournament) */,
  "match_venue" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the score belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the team (e.g., 154/5 (20)) */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs played */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., batting, bowling) */,
  "scorecard" TEXT /* Detailed scorecard for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "player_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "player_bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., fast bowler, spin bowler) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries scored */,
  "half_centuries" INTEGER /* Number of half-centuries scored */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "average" REAL /* Bowling average */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures achieved */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of times five wickets were taken */,
  "ten_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of times ten wickets were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., 8 wickets) */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "result_margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., 8 wickets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, player) */,
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "user_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
